text:
Updated bitlbee-otr to v.1.2.4.

Whoever is going to commit this port, please grab the original tarball[1] and host it on ${MASTER_SITE_FREEBSD}, as I don't have any permanent webspace.

References:
[1]  http://wahjava.googlepages.com/bitlbee-otr-1.2.4.tar.bz2

Ashish SHUKLA
